{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks about the location of myasthenia gravis. The documents provide information that myasthenia gravis is an autoimmune disorder characterized by autoantibodies targeting the neuromuscular junction (NMJ). Specifically, it affects the interaction between the nerve and muscle at the neuromuscular junction, leading to muscle weakness. Therefore, myasthenia gravis is a disorder of the neuromuscular junction.", "answer_choice": "D"}
